training_status: Active rehab: leg weights at least 3x/week, daily cycling, prehab and rehab

benefits.description: Used peptides before ACL surgery; barely needed crutches post-op, using stationary bike at 3 days post-surgery, walking without a limp at 3 days, physio amazed at recovery speed at both 1-week and 8-week check-ins

protocol_notes: Used both TB500 and BPC-157 prior to ACL surgery (pre-loading). Also took joint supplements including collagen and natural eggshell membrane. Ate clean. Worked with a doctor. Exact doses not remembered.
